target: Percolation Threshold Theory x T Cell Infiltration in Solid Tumors
creativity_constraint: bridge physical sciences and life sciences

disjointness.rationale: Ashworth 2015 applied percolation to collagen scaffolds for fibroblast invasion (field-level PARTIALLY_EXPLORED), but T cell tumor immunology application with LOX control parameter is bridge-level DISJOINT (0 PubMed papers)

pipeline_metrics.session_health_rationale: 4 COND_PASS, 0 PASS, 1 FAIL. PARTIAL because no full PASS verdicts despite all 4 survivors being mechanistically sound -- bottleneck is citation metadata errors and parametric numerical claims

final_hypotheses.title: Voronoi Tessellation of Tumor ECM Recovers 3D Percolation Universality Class, with LOX Crosslink Density Mapping to Bond Occupation Probability
Measuring the Active-Percolation Universality Class in Tumor ECM: A Two-Exponent Test Using MSD Walk Dimension and Cluster Size Power Law
TGF-beta Signaling Range Produces p_c Shift via Correlated Percolation, Making LOX + Anti-TGF-beta Synergy Calculable
Michaelis-Menten LOX Kinetics and MMP Turnover Determine the p(BAPN dose) Mapping — Percolation Therapeutic Window at 0.3-0.8 mg/mL BAPN

convergence_scanner.key_trial: NCT05753722 — PRTH-101 (Anti-DDR1) + Pembrolizumab Phase 1 (actively recruiting, directly tests collagen topology switch for T cell access)
convergence_scanner.key_patent: WO2024003558A1 — LOX inhibitor prodrugs for immunotherapy combination (ICR, 2023)

dataset_evidence_miner.key_finding: ChEMBL BAPN IC50 against LOXL2 is 66-396 nM, 3 orders of magnitude below E3-H4's 80 uM in vivo claim -- quantitative tension flagged

s019_vs_s011.shift_explanation: S019 shows higher survival rate (80% vs 50%) but lower composites (6.5 vs 7.28) due to CONDITIONAL_PASS ceiling from sparse biological parameters in tumor ECM percolation domain

strategy_performance_update.assessment: HIGH-PERFORMANCE — confirmed over 2 sessions. Strategy produces dense hypothesis families from single mathematical bridges. Bottleneck is Field C parameter availability: when biological numerical parameters are sparse, expect CONDITIONAL over PASS
strategy_performance_update.heuristic_confirmed: Measurement transfer > model transfer (S011). Structural isomorphism works best when Field C has well-characterized numerical parameters.

critic_kills.title: Universality Class Critical Exponents Are Tumor-Type-Invariant
critic_kills.description: Correlated disorder (CAF proximity, fiber alignment, TGF-beta gradients) in real tumor ECM violates standard percolation universality class requirements (Weinrib 1984 Harris criterion). Hypothesis internally inconsistent: claims universality while listing four mechanisms that would destroy it.
critic_kills.corrective_rule: For any universality prediction in a biological system, check whether the spatial heterogeneity in the biological system introduces CORRELATED disorder. If correlation length satisfies a < 2/nu, the universality class changes (Weinrib 1984). List all correlation sources explicitly.

qg_kills.title: MT1-MMP Circadian Dynamic Percolation Window
qg_kills.description: Remacle 2003 cited as Biochemistry 42:14292 (actual: J Cell Science 116:3905); Lafleur 2006 wrong page numbers. MT1-MMP membrane half-life claim (18-24 hr) unverified after citation corrections. Third consecutive session with citation metadata errors as proximate QG failure cause.
qg_kills.corrective_rule: Rule 38 extension: All citations from 2000-2015 should be flagged for venue and page verification in SELF-CRITIQUE, not just 2025-2026 citations. The 2000-2010 era has unreliable parametric metadata recall.

non_selection_kills.title: Finite-Size Scaling of T Cell MSD Explains Discordant Infiltration Scores
non_selection_kills.reason: Dominant alternative explanation (molecular heterogeneity) undermines unambiguous interpretability. Elo tournament resolved H3/H4 tie in favor of H4.

non_selection_kills.title: T Cell MSD Superdiffusive-to-Subdiffusive Transition with Self-Trapping
non_selection_kills.reason: Pe ~ 3 vs Pe >> 10 quantitative mismatch for self-trapping. T cell deformability invalidates rigid ABP model.

pipeline_error_detected.impact: MSD exponent changes from 0.53 to 0.695 -- affected H1, H2, H3, H6
pipeline_error_detected.severity: SIGNIFICANT (30% error in key predicted observable)

bridge_types_tested.type: Static bond percolation — LOX crosslink density = bond occupation probability
bridge_types_tested.outcome: SURVIVED — highest quality bridge in session

bridge_types_tested.type: Correlated percolation — biological spatial correlation as bond correlation function (NEW)

bridge_types_tested.outcome: EXCLUDED — prediction non-unique to percolation framework

new_bridge_type.name: Correlated percolation from biological spatial correlation fields
new_bridge_type.description: Spatial autocorrelation of TGF-beta signaling (40-60 um range) treated as correlated bond model via Weinrib 1984 perturbation theory, producing calculable p_c shift (+0.035 to +0.075) and quantitative combination therapy synergy prediction
new_bridge_type.recommendation: When generating structural_isomorphism hypotheses in biological systems, enumerate spatial autocorrelation functions in Field C (growth factors, ECM proteins, cell density). Apply correlated percolation perturbation theory to calculate p_c shift. Generates one additional hypothesis per extension without new bridge concept.

creativity_metrics.assessment: High-creativity range maintained. Disciplinary distance 2.75 consistent with S017-S018 range. structural_isomorphism at its best (physics x oncology) produces creativity competitive with converging_vocabularies.

computational_validation_impact.key_contribution: All physics back-of-envelope checks passed (p_c accessible, pore sizes span transition, correlation length measurable). Active particle correction (Pe ~ 3) correctly flagged as mandatory. d_w error propagated from CV but caught by Critic.
computational_validation_impact.error_propagated: d_w = 3.8 (Alexander-Orbach conjecture) used by CV; correct value 2.878. Propagated through 4 hypotheses before Critic correction.
computational_validation_impact.recommendation: CV should cite the source of d_w values explicitly (conjecture vs numerical measurement) and flag when a conjecture is used for d < 6

evolution_quality.evolution_to_qg_improvement: Mixed — d_w correction was the most impactful evolution. E1-H1 (Voronoi tessellation, Harris criterion) gained specificity. E4-H8 (quantified p_c shift) directly answered Critic questions. E5-H6 (circadian crossover) was creative but failed QG on citation errors.
evolution_quality.evolver_skip_check: Not triggered — top-3 composites 7.80/7.60/7.40 all >= 6.5 but Ranker recommended evolution to correct d_w error, tau exponent, and TGF-beta range
evolution_quality.assessment: HIGH evolution quality for 4/5 hypotheses. E5-H6 failure was citation metadata, not evolution quality. The crossover operation (MT1-MMP circadian biology applied to dynamic percolation) was the most creative evolution but most fragile to citation verification.

citation_quality.assessment: Zero hallucinations — best in recent sessions. 48% error rate is all metadata (wrong journal, wrong page numbers), not fabrication. structural_isomorphism's reliance on classical physics papers (Harris 1974, Weinrib 1984) reduces hallucination risk vs sessions citing very recent papers.
citation_quality.rule_38_extension: All citations from 2000-2015 should be flagged for venue and page verification in SELF-CRITIQUE

key_trials: NCT05753722: PRTH-101 (Anti-DDR1) + Pembrolizumab Phase 1 — DIRECTLY tests collagen topology switch for T cell access (recruiting, up to 270 patients, pivotal Phase 2 planned 2026)
NCT05109052: PXS-5505 (Pan-LOX Inhibitor) + Atezolizumab + Bevacizumab Phase 1b/2 — LOX inhibition + immunotherapy (withdrawn but rationale established; myelofibrosis trial positive 2025)
NCT02517398 + others: Bintrafusp Alfa (M7824) anti-PD-L1/TGF-beta trap Phase 1/2 — TGF-beta pathway blockade + immunotherapy
key_patents: WO2024003558A1: LOX inhibitor prodrugs (ICR, 2023) — explicitly claims immunotherapy combination
key_confirmations: Fusilier 2026 Science Immunology (PMID 41860994): Collagen III permissive vs Collagen I restrictive topology — published same month as session, independently confirms H4 topology switch
Bai 2025 Nature Communications (PMID 41436455): GPR4/LOXL2/TGF-beta drives aligned collagen that blocks CD8+ T cells — confirms H8 TGF-beta/LOX axis
Biophys J 2020 PMC7732778: T cell MSD in 3D collagen shows anomalous dynamics — confirms E2-H2 measurement feasibility
convergence_signals.overall_assessment: STRONG convergence. Industry is independently converging on LOX/collagen topology/TGF-beta as an immunotherapy axis (Phase 1 trials, patents, recent high-impact papers). The percolation theoretical framework remains the novel contribution.

new_insights.title: Active particle correction mandatory for cell biology percolation
new_insights.description: T cells have Pe~3. Standard 3D isotropic percolation exponents may not apply. All cell biology percolation hypotheses must estimate Pe, state expected universality class, and propose two-exponent measurement (d_w + tau).
new_insights.session_evidence: E2-H2 correctly treated as measurement; H6 killed for assuming Pe~3 sufficient for self-trapping

new_insights.title: Correlated percolation is an underused extension of structural isomorphism to biology
new_insights.description: Biological systems have spatially correlated heterogeneity (TGF-beta, VEGF, ECM stiffness). Weinrib 1984 perturbation theory calculates p_c shift from correlation function. Include correlated percolation extension for any structural isomorphism in biology.
new_insights.session_evidence: E4-H8 produced quantitative synergy prediction from TGF-beta spatial correlations

new_insights.title: Vocabulary re-description is detectable and separable from structural isomorphism
new_insights.description: Test: does the hypothesis predict something uniquely associated with the mathematical framework that no simpler model predicts? If prediction is generic (any heterogeneous process), it is vocabulary re-description. If unique but undetectable, quantitative insufficiency.
new_insights.session_evidence: H3 (finite-size scaling = generic) and H5-raw (quantitative insufficiency) both caught

new_insights.title: Citation Rule 38 extended to 2000-2015 era papers
new_insights.description: Generator parametric memory is unreliable for journal name and page numbers for papers from 2000-2015. Same metadata-reliability failure as S017/S018 but for older papers. Flag all 2000-2015 citations for venue and page verification.
new_insights.session_evidence: E5-H6 QG failure from Remacle 2003 and Lafleur 2006 wrong journal/page metadata

deferred_queue_update.completed: Percolation threshold x T cell infiltration in solid tumors — DONE as S019, 4 COND_PASS

Griffith Fracture Mechanics x Bacterial Cell Wall Failure Under Beta-Lactam Stress
added.risk: Prior art exists (Zhou 2015, Lam 2018, Wong 2019) — novelty must focus on beta-lactam-specific defect patterns

for_scout: structural_isomorphism CONFIRMED high-performance (2 sessions, 62.5% PASS+COND). Regular rotation.

When selecting structural_isomorphism targets, prefer Field C domains with well-characterized numerical parameters (enzyme kinetics, binding constants, physical measurements) over domains with sparse quantitative data (tumor ECM percolation parameters).
Physics x oncology pairing produces disciplinary distance 2.75 (competitive with best strategies).
for_generator: For percolation hypotheses involving biological cells as walkers: always estimate Pe, state expected universality class, and include a two-exponent measurement protocol (d_w + tau).
Include correlated percolation extension for any structural isomorphism in biology where spatial autocorrelation is present.
Uniqueness test at SELF-CRITIQUE: does this hypothesis predict something that no simpler model predicts?
Rule 38 extension: flag all citations from 2000-2015 for venue/page verification.
When mapping physical concepts to immunological states (exhaustion, anergy), verify causal molecular pathway connecting physical mechanism to cell state.
for_computational_validator: Cite source of physics constants explicitly (conjecture vs numerical measurement).
Flag when an unproven conjecture is used for a dimensional regime where it has not been verified (e.g., Alexander-Orbach conjecture for d < 6).
for_evolver: Specification operations were most productive this session (3/5 evolved).
Crossover with a new application domain (circadian biology) was the most creative but most fragile to citation verification.
When correcting a shared quantitative error across multiple hypotheses, prioritize the correction as the first evolution operation.
